# Welcome! {.unnumbered}

Welcome to the LACDR  Data Stewardship Wizard (DS Wizard) guide, which should
help you create and maintain a Data Management Plan (DMP) for your research project.

To get started click on one of the buttons below:

::: {.grid .gap-3 .pb-3 .pt-4}
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-sm-4}
[Create DMP](/docs/researchers.qmd){.btn-action-primary .btn-action .btn .btn-lg .w-100 role="button"}
:::
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-sm-4}
[Review DMP](/docs/reviewers.qmd){.btn-secondary .btn-action .btn .btn-lg .w-100 role="button"}
:::
:::
